_meta.purpose: Phase ME (Modify Existing) intent detector heuristic. Determines whether a goal text + working folder routes the wizard through the ME pipeline (vs. the new-artifact pipeline). Loaded by HarnessTaskRouter.detectModifyExistingSignals — fully content-driven, hot-reloadable.
_meta.tuning_advice: When ME mode mis-fires on a real goal: ADD a phrase to affirmativeSignals. When it fires on a clearly-new-artifact goal: ADD a phrase to newArtifactSignals. The detector is OR-of-affirmatives AND-NOT-of-rejections, modulo working-folder check upstream.
